title: Validata Evolution — SaaS Transformation
summary: Led UI architecture and delivery to evolve the product into a modern SaaS solution.
longDescription: As SMTS‑2 at Model N, designed the application from scratch, built reusable React/TypeScript components, and integrated GraphQL APIs. Delivered iterative releases while coordinating cross‑functional teams, moving the platform to a scalable SaaS model.

title: Oracle Cloud Commerce — Frontend Rebuild
summary: Greenfield React + Redux frontend built from scratch with advanced state management.
longDescription: Designed and built Oracle Cloud Commerce UI from the ground up with React and Redux, leveraging virtual DOM patterns and robust state management. Shipped 30+ features to enhance shopping experiences.

title: Performance Optimization & Personalization
summary: Reduced load times and implemented personalization (AddThis, Wishlists).
longDescription: As Project Lead, partnered with 10+ stakeholders to deliver complex solutions from inception to production. Optimized performance across browsers and refactored core architecture to support personalization data flows including AddThis and Wishlists.
outcomes: ~30% page load time reduction across browsers

title: Audiences, AddThis & Prioritized Loading
summary: End‑to‑end feature delivery in KnockoutJS/Java/ATG with measurable perf wins.
longDescription: Owned architecture‑to‑UI delivery for Audiences and AddThis; implemented event‑driven Order Approvals and efficient price/catalog determination. Prioritized Loading was recognized by org and customers for tangible performance gains.
outcomes: Organizational & customer recognition for performance improvements
